chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-303 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No.920/2021. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A.No.921/2021. 4. For hearing of main case. 19.07.2021. Mr. Maqsood Ahmed Malik, Advocate for the petitioner. == 1. Urgency is disposed of. 2to4. The petitioner under the garb of harassment is seeking protection for his property dispute wherein is pending adjudication before the Civil Court having jurisdiction, same cannot be granted by this Court in exercise of its Constitutional Jurisdiction for the reason that it is involving factual controversy. Consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with the listed application. J U D G E Muhammad Danish Steno*

Consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with the listed application. J U D G E Muhammad Danish Steno* ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-224 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No.919/2021. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A.No.885/2021. 4. For hearing of main case. 19.07.2021. Mr. Zangi Khan Associate of Mr. Willayat Ali Magsi, Advocate for the petitioner. == 1. Urgency is disposed of. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Issue notice to respondents as well as learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh. To come up on 02.08.2021. J U D G E Muhammad Danish Steno*
